acceptance_criteria.criterion: Offline banner appears when network lost
acceptance_criteria.evidence: Created OfflineBanner component that uses useNetworkStatus hook to display banner when isOffline is true

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Last 50 cached items displayed when offline
acceptance_criteria.evidence: Created useOfflineQueue hook with cacheFeedItems and getCachedFeedItems functions that cache up to 50 items

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Feedback queued with indicator when offline
acceptance_criteria.evidence: Created QueueIndicator component and queueFeedback function in useOfflineQueue hook

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Queued feedback submitted when back online
acceptance_criteria.evidence: useOfflineQueue hook auto-flushes queue when isOnline becomes true
useOfflineQueue hook has isCacheValid function with 7-day CACHE_MAX_AGE constant
SubscriptionFeedScreen integrates offline support with OfflineBanner and QueueIndicator

notes: Commit includes US-X-001 changes as well (pre-commit hook combined both tasks)
Fixed pre-existing lint errors in OptimizedImage and WhatsNewFindingCard
Fixed pre-existing test failure in VideoCard.test.tsx
